description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular design. It features a prominent pump-action fore-end with ribbed texturing for grip, a long barrel with a vented rail on top, and an integrated optical sight mounted above the receiver. The stock is compact and angular, with a pistol grip and a red magazine protruding from the bottom, suggesting a detachable box magazine system. The trigger guard is elongated and squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical black shotgun with a pump-action fore-end, optical sight, and a red box magazine. It has a compact stock and angular, robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the pump-action fore-end, optical sight, red magazine, and compact stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the optical sight above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the pump, sight, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel and sight.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented rail on top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with ample space and no visible finger grooves
